summary.title: Barcode-to-GBIF Evidence Compiler
summary.reference_database: COI Animals / BOLD public clustered reference
summary.method_or_sop: GBIF Sequence ID-compatible BLAST workflow with deterministic rank gates
summary.verdict: At least one sequence is species-safe under the frozen molecular evidence gates; publication readiness is reported separately.

reference_manifest.db_name: COI Animals / BOLD public clustered reference

source_provenance.reference_database: COI Animals / BOLD public clustered reference
source_provenance.input_contract: Sequence ID, BLAST, VSEARCH or lab-pipeline hits are treated as source evidence. EcoGenesis computes bounded claims and publication readiness; it does not convert a top hit directly into species truth.

coi_full_barcode.label: COI full barcode / COI-5P
coi_full_barcode.claim_caveat: Species claims still require ambiguity/LCA, barcode-gap and diagnostic k-mer gates.

coi_mini_barcode.label: COI mini-barcode
coi_mini_barcode.claim_caveat: Mini-barcodes require stronger coverage and explicit reference/diagnostic evidence.

its_fungi.label: ITS fungal barcode
its_fungi.claim_caveat: ITS is not translated as protein; species output depends on reference coverage and curation.

s16_full_or_near_full.label: 16S full or near-full marker
s16_full_or_near_full.claim_caveat: 16S species claims are conservative and require reference-library caveats.

s16_short_amplicon.label: 16S short amplicon
s16_short_amplicon.claim_caveat: Short 16S amplicons are treated as safe-rank evidence, not automatic species evidence.

custom_research.label: Custom research marker
custom_research.claim_caveat: Custom markers require an explicit profile before species-level export is allowed.

single_specimen_barcode.label: Single-specimen barcode
single_specimen_barcode.claim_caveat: The record is interpreted as sequence-derived occurrence evidence, not direct ecological abundance.

metabarcoding.label: Metabarcoding / eDNA batch
metabarcoding.claim_caveat: Without controls and replicate/QC metadata, detections remain molecular evidence, not confirmed living presence.

qpcr_ddpcr.label: Targeted qPCR / ddPCR detection
qpcr_ddpcr.claim_caveat: Targeted detections require explicit occurrenceStatus and contamination/control evidence.

custom_targeted.label: Custom targeted assay
custom_targeted.claim_caveat: Custom targeted assays need a supplied SOP and external validation for formal claims.

unknown.label: Unknown assay
unknown.claim_caveat: Assay type was not supplied; ecological and monitoring claims require review.

decision_rules.ambiguity_test: competitor is indistinguishable when delta mismatch rate <= 1.96 * combined standard error
decision_rules.safe_rank: lowest common ancestor of statistically indistinguishable hits
decision_rules.diagnostic_kmers: species gate requires at least one query k-mer unique to the target taxon in the reference set
decision_rules.diagnostic_false_positive_gate: diagnostic support passes only when support_count >= 1 and p_false_positive <= alpha

publication_buckets.gbif_ready: safe taxonomic decision plus dataset-level metadata readiness
publication_buckets.publishable_candidate: safe taxonomic decision and record-level metadata, but dataset metadata still needs review
publication_buckets.repair_required: blocked by molecular, backend, assay, Occurrence core or DNA-derived metadata issues
publication_buckets.review_only: kept as evidence context, not exportable as a GBIF occurrence row

data_accounting_ledger.meaning: Records received by the Barcode-to-GBIF compiler.
No GBIF occurrence download happens inside this compiler run.
Deduplication belongs to the separate GBIF occurrence audit layer.
Records that reached deterministic gate evaluation.
Records with at least one supplied reference hit.
Safe records emitted into publishable review templates but not formal GBIF-ready.
Records that passed dataset-level metadata checks for formal GBIF-ready export.
Records blocked by molecular, occurrence, assay, backend or metadata gates.
Evidence retained for review but not exportable as occurrence rows.
Species-ranked top hits that were blocked or downgraded by fail-closed gates.
Species-safe records with any failed hard gate; must remain zero.

nexus_v3.positioning: Molecular Evidence Conversion & Repair Engine for GBIF
nexus_v3.ruleset_family: EcoGenesis Nexus V3 conservative hard-gate workflow
nexus_v3.scientific_claim: The compiler computes the safest publishable taxonomic rank and repair actions under supplied molecular hits, reference evidence and GBIF/DNA-derived metadata. It does not treat a top hit as species truth.
next_platform_layers: reference completeness gate calibrated by taxon/marker coverage
protein sanity gate for coding markers
assay evidence gate for eDNA/metabarcoding/qPCR controls
safe_language: sequence-derived occurrence evidence, not proof of living presence
empty cells are no-evidence cells, not absence
observed GBIF records are evidence context, not true distribution
protein/phenotype links remain hypotheses unless external curated evidence is attached
